body:
Parent issue: #126

Stage: project-management-project-config

## Task

Implement the next small staged child under #126: make project management explicitly Project-backed and experimental at the config/docs/workflow boundary. Add documented config for a Project target, such as AGENT_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_PROJECT_ID and/or AGENT_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_PROJECT_URL, and thread it through the project-manager workflow/config surfaces where useful. Preserve current dry-run/summary behavior when no Project is configured, keep priority/* and effort/* label writes as legacy/fallback opt-in only, and avoid making repo labels the default planning UI. Do not implement GitHub Project creation, setup issue templates, /setup route behavior, repo variable mutation, or full Project field sync yet; those belong to later child tasks. Preserve behavior from PRs #134, #136, and #141, and add focused docs/tests/envelope coverage for the new config contract.

## Base

- base_pr: #141

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:126 stage:project-management-project-config state:done parent_round:3 -->
